name: Fleetpartners Group Limited
analysis: FPR's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 0% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.9200. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.9600, stop A$2.6977, target A$3.7468 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
